subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art wronged! We have heard that wherewith Thou didst praise God, and that wherewith Thou didst supplicate unto Him, and that wherewith Thou didst commune with Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المظلوم قد سمعنا ما اثنیت به الله و ما دعوت به الله و ما ناجیت به
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for protection
